MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY HENG HOON CHO DBA WE CARE OPTICAL IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO PROVIDE FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 PER MONTH, COMMENCING APRIL 1. 2008, AND CONTINUING ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL FULLY PAID. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED THE ENTIRE BALANCE SHALL BECOME DUE IMMEDIATELY.
